summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Jobflow Phase 7A (Enhanced AI analysis) and Phase 7B (ATS Checker page rewrite). All backend APIs working correctly with new dual scoring, skill frequency, searchability, and typed suggestions. Frontend successfully implements two-panel layout with score ring, tabs, and interactive suggestion system.
passed_tests: Authentication with session token
POST /api/ai/analyze-cv returns new Phase 7A fields (ats_score, recruiter_score, searchability, recruiter_tips, suggestions)
AI analysis returns realistic scores (35-65 range) with 12+ hard skills and cv_count/jd_count
POST /api/ats/save stores all new Phase 7A fields correctly
GET /api/ats/results returns saved results with all new fields
ATS page shows two-panel layout (left: score ring + tabs, right: inline resume)
Score ring displays dual ATS/Recruiter badges (ATS: 72, Recruiter: 58)
Three tabs (Skills/Searchability/Tips) are functional and clickable
Skills tab shows hard skills with matched/missing indicators and frequency badges
Skills tab 'Missing only' filter toggle works correctly
Searchability tab shows items with present/missing/weak status
Tips tab shows cards with priority badges (high/medium/low)
Right panel shows inline CV text with highlighted suggestions
Suggestion Apply/Skip buttons work for accepting/rejecting suggestions
Toolbar shows suggestion counter and functional buttons
Compare view shows side-by-side original vs optimised
Edit mode shows editable textarea with Copy/Download buttons
Cover letter tab still works unchanged
Navigation between Board, ATS Checker, and Contacts works
Existing API endpoints (parse-jd, cover-letter) remain functional
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (6/6 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (19/20 features working, 1 minor DOM interaction issue)
